variants: Vesna Djurdjevic is an expert in agricultural economics who holds a professional license as a Deepsea Etiquette Warden. She received her doctoral training under the mentorship of Jelena Stojanovic. In addition to her academic pursuits, Vesna is an active member of the Citrine String Twisters, a society dedicated to agricultural innovation. Her research and projects are primarily funded by the Sunrise Mosaic Foundation. Through her various roles, Vesna has made significant contributions to both her field and her community.
